channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Daily Zimbabwe Weather + Tsumo
channel.description: Daily weather forecast for Zimbabwe's main cities plus the Tsumo yezuva (proverb of the day). One item per day, dedicated for the Mutapa Times weather autolist.

item.title: Zim weather 22 Jul: Harare clear sky · high 23° / low 11°
item.description: Harare: high 23°, low 11° (clear sky) · Bulawayo: high 25°, low 12° (overcast) · Mutare: high 21°, low 12° (clear sky) · Gweru: high 25°, low 11° (clear sky) · Masvingo: high 26°, low 11° (clear sky) · Victoria Falls: high 28°, low 12° (clear sky) Tsumo yezuva: Mwana wamambo muranda kumwe. (Authority only works within its territory.) #Zimbabwe #Weather #ZimbabweWeather #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times
